title: Descent of the Refuge
summary: From Molly Booth, Morgan Shields and Chris Morgan, “ Descent of the Refuge ” brings awareness to protecting the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge through the story of three friends on a backcountry skiing expedition around the Okpilak Watershed, and their journey across the Arctic Refuge coastal plain. Essay by: Chris Morgan; Film by: Molly Booth and Morgan Shields Our team of three set off into the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge with two goals. title: Rental Assistance Available
summary: The Kenaitze/Salamatof Tribally Designated Housing Entity has a program for qualified Alaska Native and American Indians, who have disproportionately suffered from the impacts of the COVID-19 pandemic, to provide emergency rental assistance for the payment of rent, utilities, and arrearages.
